notes: Module `foundational_controls_gaps` disables Security Hub via CLI local-exec.
Module `foundational_controls_gaps` removes GuardDuty detectors in the target region via CLI.

Module `foundational_controls_gaps` singleton-safely ensures recorder/channel exist and stops recorder. If another recorder (for example `default`) remains recording, stop it manually to force non-compliance.

Module `foundational_controls_gaps` creates a regional-only CloudTrail writing to central audit S3. If an existing compliant multi-region trail exists, disable/delete it manually to force CloudTrail.1 failure.
Module `insecure_workload_stack` disables account-level S3 Block Public Access.
Module `insecure_workload_stack` creates public bucket policy + bucket-level PAB disabled.
Alias finding covered by same public S3 bucket scenario as S3.2.
Alias finding covered by same public S3 bucket scenario as S3.2.
Alias finding covered by same public S3 bucket scenario as S3.2.
Module `insecure_workload_stack` sets bucket policy that omits SecureTransport deny.
Module `insecure_workload_stack` keeps a bucket without default encryption.
Module `insecure_workload_stack` sets SSE-S3 instead of SSE-KMS.
Module `insecure_workload_stack` creates a bucket with server access logging not enabled.
Module `insecure_workload_stack` creates a bucket with no lifecycle rules.
Module `insecure_workload_stack` launches EC2 with SG exposing 22/3389 to internet.
Alias finding covered by the same open-admin-ports security group on workload EC2.
Alias finding covered by the same open-admin-ports security group on workload EC2.
Alias finding covered by the same open-admin-ports security group on workload EC2.
Module `insecure_workload_stack` disables snapshot block public access via EC2 API and makes workload snapshot publicly shareable.
Module `insecure_workload_stack` disables EBS encryption by default and provisions unencrypted root/data volumes.
Root access key creation requires interactive root-user credentials and cannot be safely automated via Terraform/CloudFormation.
Requires a live vulnerable package/CVE state and scan timing; IaC can deploy substrate only, not guaranteed stable finding generation.
